name: community namespacing: aggregated rule output includes origin community plus a community_plugin field carrying the plugin id
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json > out.txt 2>/dev/null && grep -E '"origin":"community"' out.txt 1>&2 && grep -E '"community_plugin":"acme"' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: a
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - {id: foo, name: foo, description: x, detector: x}
' > tree/_community/acme/x.yaml
